deck:
* Buck Converter - Generated by OpenMagnetics
* Vin=12V, Vout=5V, f=100kHz, D=41.6667 pct
* L=37.6984uH, Iout=2A

* DC Input
Vin vin_src 0 12
Vin_sense vin_src vin_dc 0

* §8a.5 input-current sense
Vq1_sense vin_dc q1_drain 0

* PWM High-side Switch
Vpwm pwm_ctrl 0 PULSE(0 5 0 1.000000e-08 1.000000e-08 4.166667e-06 1.000000e-05)
.model SW1 SW VT=2.500000 VH=0.500000 RON=0.010000 ROFF=1000000.000000
S1 q1_drain sw pwm_ctrl 0 SW1
Rsnub_s1 vin_dc sw 100.000000
Csnub_s1 vin_dc sw 1.000000e-10

* Freewheeling Diode
.model DIDEAL D(IS=1.000000e-14 RS=1.000000e-06)
D1 0 sw DIDEAL

* Inductor with current sense
Vl_sense sw l_in 0
L1 l_in vout 3.769840e-05
Bvpri_diff vpri_diff 0 V=V(l_in)-V(vout)

* Output Filter and Load
Cout vout 0 1.000000e-04 IC=5.000000
Rload vout 0 2.500000

* Transient Analysis
.tran 5.000000e-08 2.401000e-02 2.400000e-02

* Output signals
.save v(vpri_diff) v(vin_dc) v(sw) v(vout) i(Vl_sense) i(Vin_sense) i(Vq1_sense)

.options RELTOL=0.001000 ABSTOL=1.000000e-09 VNTOL=1.000000e-06 ITL1=1000 ITL4=1000
.options METHOD=GEAR TRTOL=7.000000
.ic v(vout)=5.000000

.end
